","book_info":{"abstract":"【超级科技+商业+军工+强国】
陈序继承父母的破旧作坊，开局负债，面临绝境！
危急关头，激活【万能科技系统】，获得逆天能力——召唤神级生化工程师！
从此，世界画风突变！
【你兑换了Lv1学徒，他用废料搓出磁导增强电机，性能吊打全行业！】
【你兑换了Lv2工匠，他打造出“灵犀”神经芯片，让残疾人跑得比奥运冠军还快，颠覆生命定义！】
【你兑换了Lv3巨匠，他手搓光刻机，“昆仑”芯片问世，鹰酱的技术封锁沦为世纪笑话！】
【你兑回了Lv4宗师，AI生命【零】，她用代码编写出可控核聚变，人类正式迈入星际时代！】
【你……】
当别国还在为5G争吵不休，星辰科技的全息网游已经覆盖全球。
当水果公司沾沾自喜发布刘海屏，陈序的“天枢”手机已经实现了肉眼3D。
当鹰酱叫嚣着要武力制裁，华国的反重力机甲军团已经悬停在了他们的上空！
漂亮国商务部长：“我们制裁了个神！他正在用科技反向绞杀我们！”
水果CEO：“求求了，把你们的电池卖给我们吧，价格你随便开！”
华威大佬：“我愿称陈总为华夏科技的灯塔，他一人，即是第四次工业革命！”
从一个小作坊开始，打造一个横跨能源、军工、生物、航天的科技帝国！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8be70d001e9de7ab9ab1b467f05c3580","author":"日赚三十","author_id":"","book_id":"7560714359207382040","book_name":"鹰酱断供芯片？我反手卖光刻机！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7560714405592171032","read_count":"29645","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"654291"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"317","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,打脸,黑科技","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/30f505ed8f30f0b3a2ab00f93c29b394~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779321034&x-signature=SYnd%2BcIsM3PGgn%2BG%2F3qT2zAQ%2Bqw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2411695877417130","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"336"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322075034344404F3801EB0E0E474"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":19667,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":39122,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3493},"user_action":{"au
